name: Bankr
description: Executes onchain trading, wallet management, and automation from a natural-language terminal across 9 chains, including Hyperliquid. Works from external agent harnesses via Skills.

skills.name: Onchain Trading
skills.description: Executes trades and swaps across 9 chains including full Hyperliquid support from natural language.

skills.name: Wallet Management
skills.description: Manages onchain wallets, balances, and transfers on behalf of the user or an agent.

skills.name: Trading Automation
skills.description: Automates recurring onchain actions and strategies callable from external agent harnesses.
